endpoints.docstring: Delete a chapter with state rollback. Only the latest chapter can be deleted.
Return stage gate progress with auto-detection.
Return all chapter outlines for a volume.
Export all chapters of a novel in the requested format.
SSE streaming AI chat (supports both Anthropic and OpenAI formats)
One-click optimize: fix issues found during review
Write/update any file in a novel's directory
Return available writing styles from DB presets + distilled JSON fingerprints.
Run all pre-generation enforcement scripts. Returns pass/fail for each.
Run the complete enforcement pipeline for a chapter.
Delete all .bak backup files for a novel

get_foreshadowing_for_volume.docstring: Get foreshadowing scoped to a specific volume.

get_novel_stats.docstring: Get aggregate stats for a novel (word counts, review counts, etc).

get_plot_arcs_for_volume.docstring: Get active plot arcs spanning the current volume.

get_previous_chapter.docstring: Get the immediately preceding chapter for continuity.

get_recent_character_events.docstring: Get character events from recent chapters for state tracking.

get_style_preset_by_name.docstring: Look up a single style preset by name. Returns None if not found.

get_unresolved_foreshadowing.docstring: Get unresolved foreshadowing that should be resolved soon.

get_usage_breakdown.docstring: Get detailed usage breakdown by model and operation.

get_world_building_for_volume.docstring: Get world building entries relevant to current volume.

get_world_building_volume_plus_global.docstring: Get local-volume world building (vol-1..vol+1) PLUS a global sample.

init_config_seed.docstring: Seed config tables with default data (idempotent).

list_characters_active_in_volume.docstring: Characters whose current_vol is within ±1 of the given volume.

list_genre_rules.docstring: Return all genre_rules for a novel. Empty list if novel has none.

load_all_config.docstring: Load all config entries as a dict (for get_active_deepseek_config).

search_all.docstring: Search across chapters, outlines, reviews. Returns dict compatible with old content_db.search_all().

search_chapters.docstring: Full-text search on chapters using LIKE fallback (FTS5 no longer used).

update_chapter_metadata.docstring: Update v3 chapter metadata (pace_type, emotional_beat, etc.)

update_character.docstring: Update character fields. Returns True if successful.
